html:
📰 每日 AI 新聞 Top 10 · 2026-07-09
1. SpaceXAI Launches Grok 4.5, First Model Co-Trained With Cursor模型
SpaceXAI推出Grok 4.5，首款與Cursor共同訓練的AI模型
SpaceXAI unveiled Grok 4.5 on Wednesday, its most powerful model yet, focused on coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work. It is the first model co-trained with the Cursor AI code editor, now available via Grok Build, Cursor, and the SpaceXAI API.
SpaceXAI周三發表新一代大型語言模型Grok 4.5，定位為該公司迄今最強大的AI模型，主打程式開發、代理人任務及知識工作，是首款與AI程式編輯器Cursor共同訓練的模型。
iThome · 原文連結
2. CISA Reportedly Uses Anthropic's Mythos to Scan US Government Code資安
CISA據傳使用Mythos掃描政府程式碼庫，找出可能遭濫用的漏洞
Reuters reports that the US Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency is using Anthropic's Mythos model to scan federal code repositories, aiming to flag vulnerabilities foreign intelligence agencies or cybercriminals could exploit.
路透社引述消息人士報導，美國CISA正使用Anthropic的Mythos模型掃描政府程式碼儲存庫，藉此找出可能遭外國情報機構或網路犯罪分子利用的資安漏洞。
iThome · 原文連結
3. Taiwan's Ministry of Digital Affairs Unveils AI Risk Classification Framework政策
數發部正式公布人工智慧風險分類框架，畫分3大類20項子類別
Following the Basic Act on AI taking effect in January, Taiwan's Ministry of Digital Affairs published a risk classification framework dividing AI applications into three major categories and 20 sub-categories, with four recommended steps for agencies.
隨著《人工智慧基本法》正式上路，數發部公布人工智慧風險分類框架，畫分3大類20項子類別，並提供4大建議步驟供各部會參考。
iThome · 原文連結
4. 15-Year-Old Linux Kernel Flaw "GhostLock" Discovered資安
Linux核心存在長達15年的漏洞GhostLock
Security researchers at Nebula Security disclosed CVE-2026-43499, a stack use-after-free flaw introduced in 2011 that affects all Linux distributions and can be triggered with ordinary thread-related syscalls. It has been patched in kernel 7.1.
資安研究團隊Nebula Security揭露Linux核心漏洞GhostLock，此弱點自2011年引入，潛伏長達15年，影響所有Linux發行版，攻擊者僅需一般系統呼叫即可觸發，已於核心7.1版修補。
iThome · 原文連結
5. OpenAI Introduces GPT-Live, New Voice Models for Natural Conversation產品
OpenAI推出GPT-Live語音模型，讓對話更自然
OpenAI released GPT-Live, a new generation of voice models that can speak and listen simultaneously, now powering ChatGPT's voice mode with fewer interruptions and more natural turn-taking.
OpenAI發布新一代語音模型GPT-Live，可同時說話與聆聽，現已用於ChatGPT語音模式，減少打斷並讓對話更貼近真人互動。
OpenAI · 原文連結
6. Anthropic Rolls Out Claude Cowork on Mobile and Web產品
Anthropic公布Claude Cowork手機與Web版，從Max方案開始部署
Anthropic this week launched mobile and web apps for its autonomous business agent Claude Cowork, letting employees draft emails and create files across apps. The beta starts with Max-tier subscribers before expanding to other plans.
Anthropic本周宣布商務自主代理人工具Claude Cowork推出手機及Web版App，可跨檔案、應用程式執行寫信、建立檔案等商務作業，將先提供給最高等級付費方案Max用戶。
iThome · 原文連結
7. Prime Intellect Raises $130M Series A to Help Enterprises Build AI Agents產業
Prime Intellect獲1.3億美元A輪融資，助企業打造專屬AI代理人
Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect aims to give organizations the capability to train their own agentic AI systems without depending on frontier AI labs.
成立於2024年的Prime Intellect，目標是讓企業具備自行訓練代理式AI系統的能力，不必仰賴頂尖AI實驗室。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
8. OpenAI Analysis Finds Flaws in Popular SWE-Bench Pro Coding Benchmark研究
OpenAI分析揭露SWE-Bench Pro程式碼評測基準的可靠性問題
A new OpenAI analysis reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a widely used coding benchmark, raising concerns about the reliability and accuracy of how AI coding models are evaluated.
OpenAI最新分析揭露廣泛使用的程式碼評測基準SWE-Bench Pro存在問題，對AI模型評測的可靠性與準確性提出疑慮。
OpenAI · 原文連結
9. Accenture Confirms Breach, Attackers Claim to Have Stolen 35GB of Data資安
Accenture證實遭駭，攻擊者聲稱竊得35GB資料
Accenture confirmed a security incident to Bleeping Computer, calling it an isolated case that has been resolved without affecting operations or service delivery. It came to light after a threat actor claimed to be selling stolen data on a cybercrime forum.
Accenture向Bleeping Computer證實發生資安事故，稱屬個別情況且已修復問題來源，未影響公司營運與服務交付；事件因威脅行為者聲稱竊得資料並在犯罪論壇兜售而曝光。
iThome · 原文連結
10. Startup General Intuition Bets Video Game Data Can Power Robotics' "ChatGPT Moment"研究
新創General Intuition認為機器人領域即將迎來自己的ChatGPT時刻
General Intuition is betting that millions of hours of video game data can train foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.
General Intuition認為透過數百萬小時的電玩遊戲資料，可訓練出用於實體AI的基礎模型，讓開發智慧機器人不再需要大量真實世界資料。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
由 AI News Digest 從各家 RSS 自動挑選、翻譯並寄送
